div.h1: Shared Header: One mydevice.h Compiled in Two Worlds

p.em: Intel Manual Quality — Struct Alignment & ABI Contract

tr.td: Sparse-only tag; no-op in GCC but noisy

p.em: If the struct size differs by even 1 byte, the command ID changes and ioctl() returns -ENOTTY.

div.p: Layout Engine: ELK Theme: Technical Neutral Verified: Byte-level alignment verified for x86_64

c #define MYDEVICE_IOC_MAGIC 'k' // 0x6B #define MYDEVICE_IOC_RESIZE
_IOW('k', 0, unsigned long) #define MYDEVICE_IOC_CLEAR
_IO ('k', 1) #define MYDEVICE_IOC_STATUS
_IOR('k', 2, struct mydevice_status) #define MYDEVICE_IOC_MAXNR 2

p.em: Macros compute command IDs based on type size.

ul.li: Use fixed-width types or kernel-equivalent long
